title: dysphania graveolens
intro: Dysphania graveolens, also known as Epazote, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysphania graveolens include its ability to aid digestion, reduce flatulence, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online.
